holdings.infoBox: GLIN is an equity ETF with a total of 83 individual holdings. The top holdings are BSE Limited stock at 6.70%, Trent at 4.77%, Eicher Motors at 4.69%, Bharti Airtel at 4.62%, and Hindustan Aeronautics at 4.32%.

overview.description: The VanEck India Growth Leaders ETF (GLIN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of growth companies in India. GLIN was launched on Aug 25, 2010 and is issued by VanEck.

data.title: VanEck Announces Year-End Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
